title: Creamy Chicken Curry
description: A rich and creamy Indian-inspired curry made with tender chicken and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the heavy cream and let cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with cilantro if desired.
Serve with basmati rice or naan bread for a complete meal.
